creator: lightside@gmx.com
text:
(In reply to comment #11)
> This issue affects me, and I think it might be best to remove the RUN_DEPENDS.
The devel/tig-plain (in attachment #173801) does almost the same, while main devel/tig port is available as is.

(In reply to comment #14)
Please check your text editor settings. Looks like, it converts tabs to spaces, if looking attachment #187711. The `portlint -C` may report about this.
